query: SELECT id, title, status, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisResults, '$.suggestions[0].frameSnapshots') as snap0, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisResults, '$.suggestions[1].frameSnapshots') as snap1 FROM videoAnalyses WHERE status = 'complete' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 3;
